message:
chore(packs): add RegexSet struct fields to all pack initializers

Add the two new Pack struct fields required by the RegexSet optimization
to all pack create_pack() functions. These fields are initialized to their
default values and populated during pack registration.

Fields added to each pack:
- safe_regex_set: None
- safe_regex_set_is_complete: false

This is a mechanical update to bring all 78 packs into compliance with the
updated Pack struct. The actual RegexSet building happens in
PackEntry::get_pack() during pack registration, not in the create_pack()
functions.

Affected packs (78 total):
- API Gateway: apigee, aws
- Backup: borg, rclone, restic, velero
- CDN: cloudflare_workers, cloudfront, fastly
- CI/CD: circleci, github_actions, gitlab_ci, jenkins
- Cloud: aws, azure, gcp
- Containers: compose, docker, podman
- Core: filesystem, git
- Database: mongodb, mysql, postgresql, redis, sqlite
- DNS: cloudflare, generic, route53
- Email: mailgun, postmark, sendgrid, ses
- Feature Flags: flipt, launchdarkly, split, unleash
- Infrastructure: ansible, pulumi, terraform
- Kubernetes: helm, kubectl, kustomize
- Load Balancer: elb, haproxy, nginx, traefik
- Messaging: kafka, nats, rabbitmq, sqs_sns
- Monitoring: datadog, newrelic, pagerduty, prometheus, splunk
- Package Managers: mod (npm, pip, etc.)
- Payment: braintree, square, stripe
- Platform: github, gitlab
- Remote: rsync, scp, ssh
- Search: algolia, elasticsearch, meilisearch, opensearch
- Secrets: aws_secrets, doppler, onepassword, vault
- Storage: azure_blob, gcs, minio, s3
- Strict Git: mod
- System: disk, permissions, services

Also updates tests/fast_path_verification.rs to include the new struct fields
in test Pack construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
